hero.title: Find the Most Cost-Effective

faq.title: ❓ Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Which AI API is the cheapest?
faq.a1: By absolute price, Doubao and DeepSeek-V3 are the cheapest. But considering model capability, DeepSeek offers the best value — currently the most recommended low-cost high-performance option.
faq.q2: Can I use OpenAI and Claude API in China?
faq.a2: In theory yes, but a proxy service is required. Direct access from China is restricted or extremely slow. We recommend using domestic direct-access options (like DeepSeek, Zhipu GLM) or an API proxy service.
faq.q3: Is DeepSeek API actually usable? How is the quality?
faq.a3: DeepSeek-V3 and DeepSeek-R1 have reached GPT-4 level capability, even stronger in coding and math reasoning. DeepSeek-R1 supports chain-of-thought output with transparent reasoning. The only downside is the ecosystem isn't as rich as OpenAI's, but the price is a fraction of OpenAI's.
faq.q4: How do I apply for these AI APIs?
faq.a4: The process is similar for all providers: Register account → Identity verification (domestic platforms) → Top up / buy resource pack → Get API Key → Start calling. See our tutorials for specific guides.
